---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a change to ccw's behaviour or interface
labels: enhancement
---

### Problem

<!-- What workflow are you trying to support? What does ccw do today that
gets in the way, or what is missing entirely? -->

### Proposal

<!-- Concrete change. CLI flag, TUI binding, config key, behaviour. -->

### Alternatives considered

<!-- What did you try first? Why didn't it work? -->

### Compatibility

<!-- Would this break existing config, session names, or commands? -->
